description_long: This cabin features a gable roof with a natural wood finish and a small chimney protruding from one side. The exterior walls are constructed from a combination of light gray stone and a lower band of rougher, darker stone, giving it a rustic yet sturdy appearance. The front facade has a large rectangular window, while the rear displays three evenly spaced arched windows, adding architectural interest. The side walls are clad in stone, with one side featuring a single rectangular window and the other side being windowless. There is no visible door or porch structure attached to the cabin. The overall design suggests a compact, traditional residential building suitable for a small urban or suburban lot.
description: A compact stone cabin with a gable wooden roof, large front window, and three arched rear windows, featuring rustic stonework and a small chimney.
description_view_0: Front view shows a large rectangular window centered on a stone facade beneath a gable roof with a chimney visible on the left.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a solid stone wall with no windows or doors, and the wooden roof with a chimney near the center.
description_view_2: Rear view displays three evenly spaced arched windows set in a stone wall, with the gable roof and chimney visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a single rectangular window in the stone wall, with the wooden roof extending overhead.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs, constructed from wooden planks and featuring a small stone chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: One large rectangular window centered on the front facade, three evenly spaced arched windows on the rear facade, and a single rectangular window on one side; windows are symmetrically arranged on their respective sides
attribute_door_placement: No exterior doors are visible on any side of the cabin
